features.name: hierarchical assignment to generate-reg array element
features.description: Code should include a hierarchical assignment to an array element that is declared inside a generate block

features.name: generate block with reg array read via hierarchical reference
features.description: Code should include a generate block containing a reg array declaration, where the array is read via a hierarchical path from outside the generate
features.snippet:
generate genvar g_cx; for (g_cx = 0; g_cx < CM_NUMXROWS; g_cx++) begin: cxrow_inst reg[15:0] cmem_xrow[0:CM_XROWSIZE - 1]; end endgenerate
 assign dout = cxrow_inst[0].cmem_xrow[addr];

features.name: parameterized generate loop creating memory array instances
features.description: Code should include a parameterized generate loop that creates multiple instances of a reg array, where array size exceeds 256 elements
